package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceReturnsTxToCaller() string {
    ruleID := "service_returns_tx_to_caller"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Services that hand transaction objects back to handlers or controllers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
